wizard.description: Generate schema or apply answers documents.
wizard.questions.agent_endpoint_default_: Choose the default approval mode written to generated agent endpoint declarations.
Choose the default risk level written to generated agent endpoint declarations.
Choose which downstream handoff formats should see generated agent endpoints.
wizard.questions.agent_endpoint_ids.help: Use stable IDs such as create_customer_contact or request_partner_followup.
wizard.questions.agent_endpoint_provider: Optional abstract provider category used for downstream agent endpoint handoff.
wizard.questions.agent_endpoints_enabled: Enable this when agents should discover safe business actions such as creating a contact or requesting approval.
wizard.questions.compatibility_mode.help: Describe whether the next package change is additive, backward-compatible, or breaking.
wizard.questions.default_source.help: Choose whether new records default to native, external, or hybrid semantics.
wizard.questions.default_source.label: Default record source
wizard.questions.events_enabled.help: Keep event declarations enabled for event-native package generation.
wizard.questions.events_enabled.label: Enable event declarations
wizard.questions.external_ref_provider.h: Select the abstract provider category used for external system lookups.
wizard.questions.external_system.help: Name the external system of record when external or hybrid records are used.
wizard.questions.external_system.label: External system name
wizard.questions.include_agent_tools.hel: Emit `agent-tools.json` alongside the canonical artefact set.
wizard.questions.output_artifacts.help: Choose which artefact files should be generated by default.
wizard.questions.output_artifacts.label: Output artefacts
wizard.questions.package_name.help: Use a stable package identity that can live in Git.
wizard.questions.package_name.label: Package name
wizard.questions.package_version.help: Start with a version that matches the package manifest and release tags.
wizard.questions.package_version.label: Package version
wizard.questions.partial_answers.help: Update flows may supply only the values that need to change.
wizard.questions.partial_answers.label: Allow partial answers
wizard.questions.projection_mode.help: Choose the default projection style for generated read models.
wizard.questions.projection_mode.label: Projection mode
wizard.questions.provider_hints.help: Optional hints can guide later provider binding without hard-coding a provider now.
wizard.questions.provider_hints.label: Provider hints
wizard.questions.storage_provider.help: Select the abstract storage capability category required by this package.
wizard.questions.storage_provider.label: Storage provider category
wizard.questions.update_mode.help: Choose whether to apply a safe update or refresh all generated wizard-owned content.
wizard.questions.update_mode.label: Update mode
wizard.sections.agent_endpoints.descript: Describe business-safe actions that agents can discover and request through downstream gateway exports.
wizard.sections.agent_endpoints.title: Agent endpoints
wizard.sections.compatibility.descriptio: Capture migration compatibility intent and projection evolution choices.
wizard.sections.compatibility.title: Compatibility and evolution
wizard.sections.events.description: Configure event-native behaviour and projection defaults.
wizard.sections.events.title: Events and projections
wizard.sections.external_sources.descrip: Declare whether records are native, external, or hybrid and capture external source references.
wizard.sections.external_sources.title: External sources
wizard.sections.output.description: Choose which generated artefacts and helper outputs should be produced.
wizard.sections.output.title: Output preferences
wizard.sections.package.description: Create the initial SoRLa package layout.
wizard.sections.package.title: Package bootstrap
wizard.sections.providers.description: Describe provider capability categories without binding concrete providers.
wizard.sections.providers.title: Provider requirements
wizard.sections.update.description: Update an existing SoRLa package without overwriting user-authored content outside generated sections.
wizard.sections.update.title: Package update
wizard.title: SoRLa wizard
wizard.validation.missing_answers: An answers file is required for this mode.
